headline: Goldman Sachs flags 3 chip stocks to buy and 3 to avoid into Q1 earnings
summary: Investing.com -- Goldman Sachs sees broad fundamental upside across the semiconductor sector heading into first-quarter earnings, but with a selective view on which names may outperform and which could disappoint.

headline: Shares of semiconductors companies are trading higher amid overall market gain as supply chain concerns eased after the U.S. and Iran reached a ceasefire deal. Also, President Trump's social media post over the proposed 15-point agenda further lifted sentiments

headline: KLA CORP (NASDAQ:KLAC) Shows Strong Technical Setup for Potential Breakout
summary: KLA Corp (KLAC) is a top-rated technical breakout candidate, showing strong uptrend momentum and a high-quality consolidation setup for a potential entry.

headline: Here's What to Expect From KLA Corporation's Next Earnings Report
